productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Placid blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations Let them know you're in a dirty mood today, all set to be a bad girl, with this T-shirt from little miss. The rubber and flock print adds an edge to the mood, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans and sneakers.
